import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{getAuth}from'firebase/auth';import{getStorage,ref,listAll}from'firebase/storage';import{toast}from'react-toastify';import'./VideoPage.css';import'./SecondPage.css';// For common styles
import'./ProjectsPage.css';// Project-specific styles
import PingButton from'../common/PingButton';// Import the PingButton component
import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs,Fragment as _Fragment}from"react/jsx-runtime";function ProjectsPage(){const auth=getAuth();const user=auth.currentUser;const navigate=useNavigate();const[projects,setProjects]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);// Fetch user's projects
useEffect(()=>{if(!user)return;const fetchProjects=async()=>{try{setLoading(true);const storage=getStorage();const userStorageRef=ref(storage,user.uid);// List all projects (folders) in the user's storage
const projectsResult=await listAll(userStorageRef);// For each project, get its videos count
const projectsData=await Promise.all(projectsResult.prefixes.map(async projectRef=>{const projectName=projectRef.name;const videosResult=await listAll(projectRef);return{name:projectName,videoCount:videosResult.items.length};}));setProjects(projectsData);}catch(error){console.error('Error fetching projects:',error);toast.error('Failed to load projects. Please try again.');}finally{setLoading(false);}};fetchProjects();},[user]);const handleProjectSelect=projectName=>{navigate('/video-page',{state:{projectName}});};const handleCreateProject=()=>{navigate('/upload-project');};if(!user){return null;// or a loading spinner
}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"second-page",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"user-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Your Projects"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"projects-container",children:loading?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"loading-spinner"}):projects.length===0?/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"empty-projects",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"You don't have any projects yet."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:handleCreateProject,className:"create-project-button",children:"Create Your First Project"})]}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"projects-header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"All Projects"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:handleCreateProject,className:"create-project-button",children:"+ New Project"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"projects-list",children:projects.map(project=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"project-item",onClick:()=>handleProjectSelect(project.name),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:project.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:[project.videoCount," video",project.videoCount!==1?'s':'']})]},project.name))})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(PingButton,{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"button-group",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>navigate('/'),className:"back-button",children:"Back to Home"})})]})});}export default ProjectsPage;
